examples: A Mafia Museum was inaugurated in Corleone.
Somewhere along the line, holiday tipping went from an optional thank-you for a year of services to a Mafia-style protection racket.
The fuel mafia that supplies generator owners is up in arms.
Zynga used Texas HoldEm Poker to introduce players to future hits Mafia Wars and Farmville.
So yesterday I met-up with one of the members of the PayPal Mafia, David Sacks.
